commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR threads lightweight context mode and effective tools into preemptive prompt-budget checks, adds tool-schema-aware lightweight budgeting, and extends regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +78. Total +131 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main gives a 4,096-token model a 2,048-token prompt budget, so the reported 3,544-token lightweight cron prompt routes toward compact_only; the PR body also includes after-fix cron logs showing route=fits.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a concrete compatibility repair: make the new diagnostic result field non-breaking while preserving the lightweight cron fix.

target.title: fix(agents): keep lightweight cron prompts out of no-op compaction
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96658.

Lightweight isolated cron runs on very small context windows can reserve too much of the model window for response headroom before the first prompt is sent. In the reported 4,096-token model case, current `main` leaves only 2,048 prompt tokens for a 3,544-token lightweight cron prompt, so the precheck routes to `compact_only` even though lightweight cron has no bootstrap history to compact.

## Why This Change Was Made

This keeps the shared small-context prompt floor conservative and restores `MIN_PROMPT_BUDGET_RATIO` to `0.5` for full-context callers, settings reserve capping, CLI compaction, and mid-turn guard paths.

The higher 87.5% prompt share is now scoped to lightweight pre-prompt runner admission only. That gives history-free lightweight cron prompts enough room on 4k local models without changing the global reserve policy.

Codex also pointed out that provider requests carry tool schemas next to messages. The current fix passes the runner's effective tool list into the pre-prompt decision and subtracts estimated `toolSchemaTokens` before accepting a small-window `fits` route. A 3,544-token lightweight prompt with no tools still fits; the same prompt plus a 570-token tool schema now routes to `compact_only` instead of over-submitting the provider payload.

## User Impact

Lightweight cron jobs on small-context fallback models can proceed when the rendered prompt plus tool schema surface fits the model window, instead of failing through repeated compact-only recovery with nothing useful to compact.

Tool-heavy small-context runs remain conservative, and non-lightweight/full-context paths keep the previous shared reserve behavior.

## Evidence

Earlier real lightweight cron behavior proof on this PR branch:

```text
Setup: source Gateway from this PR branch, temp HOME and OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR, local mock OpenAI Responses server.
Config: openai/gpt-5.5 contextWindow=4096 contextTokens=4096, agents.defaults.compaction.reserveTokens=20000.
Action: cron.add with sessionTarget=isolated, payload.kind=agentTurn, payload.lightContext=true, then cron.run mode=force.
Result: cron finished status=ok; mock provider received 2 POST /v1/responses requests.
```

Gateway debug proof from that run:

```text
[context-overflow-precheck] pre-prompt check ... provider=openai/gpt-5.5 route=fits estimatedPromptTokens=3318 pressureSource=llm_boundary_normalized_prompt promptBudgetBeforeReserve=3584 overflowTokens=0 toolResultReducibleChars=0 reserveTokens=20000 effectiveReserveTokens=512 contextTokenBudget=4096 messages=0 unwindowedMessages=0 sessionFile=<tmp-state>/agents/main/sessions/<session>.jsonl
```

Fresh current-head source probe for the reported 4,096-token / 20,000-reserve / 3,544-token boundary:

```json
{
  "lightweightNoTools": {
    "route": "fits",
    "shouldCompact": false,
    "estimatedPromptTokens": 3544,
    "toolSchemaTokens": 0,
    "pressureSource": "reported_lightweight_cron",
    "promptBudgetBeforeReserve": 3584,
    "overflowTokens": 0,
    "toolResultReducibleChars": 0,
    "effectiveReserveTokens": 512
  },
  "lightweightWithToolSchema": {
    "route": "compact_only",
    "shouldCompact": true,
    "estimatedPromptTokens": 3544,
    "toolSchemaTokens": 570,
    "pressureSource": "reported_lightweight_cron",
    "promptBudgetBeforeReserve": 3014,
    "overflowTokens": 530,
    "toolResultReducibleChars": 0,
    "effectiveReserveTokens": 512
  },
  "fullModeNoTools": {
    "route": "compact_only",
    "shouldCompact": true,
    "estimatedPromptTokens": 3544,
    "toolSchemaTokens": 0,
    "pressureSource": "reported_lightweight_cron",
    "promptBudgetBeforeReserve": 2048,
    "overflowTokens": 1496,
    "toolResultReducibleChars": 0,
    "effectiveReserveTokens": 2048
  }
}
```

Red test before the original fix:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts
AssertionError: expected 2048 to be greater than or equal to 3544
```

Focused validation on the current head:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts
# PASS 19 tests

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts
# PASS 29 tests

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.loop.test.ts
# PASS 75 tests

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts
# PASS 19 tests

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
# PASS

node --import tsx --input-type=module -e "await import('./src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts'); console.log('attempt import ok')"
# attempt import ok

node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-compaction-constants.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts
# PASS

git diff --check
# PASS
```

CI follow-up: `check-test-types` failed on `b2144a64d36` because CLI compaction test stubs were missing the newly required `toolSchemaTokens` field. Commit `d3710f9e031` updates those stubs, and the local core test-type runner above now passes.

Review comments: Codex's tool-schema budgeting comment is addressed by the current head, and the inline thread is resolved/outdated. The current implementation restores the shared ratio, scopes the larger prompt share to lightweight pre-prompt checks, and accounts for provider-visible tool schemas.

Autoreview: attempted one local draft-PR review round, but the helper failed before review due local Codex config parsing (`service_tier = priority`; helper expected `fast` or `flex`). No review findings were produced.

Agent transcript: a matching local session was found, but no transcript is included because adding sanitized transcript logs requires explicit approval.
target.author: monkeyleet

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: MonkeyLeeT
